metadata.title: Sales Quotations | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Adon ERP Sales helps your team create polished quotes, manage pricing, close deals faster, and convert opportunities into orders.

hero.title: Quotations
hero.description: Adon ERP Sales helps your team create polished quotes, manage pricing, close deals faster, and convert opportunities into orders.

proposal.title: Proposal
proposal.name: Business automation package
proposal.description: Prepared for Green Valley Trading with implementation, onboarding, support, and optional add-ons.

productsSection.title: Manage your products,
productsSection.subtitle: pricing, and discounts
productsSection.description: Build accurate quotations from a connected product catalog. Add bundles, optional items, discounts, taxes, and delivery costs without manual calculation.

templatesSection.title: Use quote templates
templatesSection.description: Save your best sales structures as reusable templates. Your team can prepare consistent, branded, and accurate quotations in seconds.

portalSection.title: Close deals faster with
portalSection.subtitle: the customer portal
portalSection.description: Let customers review quotations, ask questions, accept terms, sign documents, and pay online through a clean branded portal.

leadsSection.title: Only focus on
leadsSection.description: Score opportunities automatically using deal value, engagement, customer history, and probability so your sales team focuses on what matters most.

productControlSection.title: Complete product
productControlSection.subtitle: control
productControlSection.description: Configure variants, optional products, discounts, packages, and customer-specific price rules without breaking your sales workflow.

reporting.title: Reporting and forecasting
reporting.description: Track quotation value, expected revenue, conversion rate, and team performance.

shippingIntegration.title: Shipping integration
shippingIntegration.description: Connect quotations with delivery costs, carriers, and fulfilment workflows.

invoicing.title: Invoicing
invoicing.description: Convert approved quotations into invoices with products, taxes, and terms.

upselling.title: Upselling
upselling.description: Recommend related products and bundles directly inside the sales flow.

quotationTemplates.title: Quotation templates
quotationTemplates.description: Reuse polished templates for different services, packages, and customer types.

customerCommunication.title: Customer communication
customerCommunication.description: Send quotes, reminders, and revisions while keeping the customer timeline clean.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand your sales workflow across the Adon ERP ecosystem.

ctaSection.title: Join modern sales teams
ctaSection.description: Teams use Adon Sales to create better quotes, close faster, and grow revenue with confidence.

getStartedSection.title: Unleash
getStartedSection.subtitle: your growth potential
getStartedSection.description: Build premium quotations, automate approvals, and turn more opportunities into confirmed orders with Adon ERP.
